heading: Presumption of existence of jurisdiction
label: 379a Presumption of existence of jurisdiction
text: In any action to enforce the requirements of this chapter respecting a device, tobacco product, food, drug, or cosmetic the connection with interstate commerce required for jurisdiction in such action shall be presumed to exist.
notes: Amendments2009— inserted “tobacco product,” after “device,”.Pub. L. 111–311997— substituted “a device, food, drug, or cosmetic” for “a device”.Pub. L. 105–115
